lines.name: Screams of the Desiccated

explicitModifiers.text: You have Acceleration Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Massive Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
+(23-37) to Intelligence
+(23-44)% to Chaos Resistance

lines.flavourText:
"I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."
